name: ai-mock-interview-platform
description: AI Mock Interview Platform — Full Stack Application

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.prisma:push: node server/src/utils/prestart.js && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db} npm run db:push --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build:client
scripts.start: npm run prisma:push && npm start --prefix server
